description_long: This humanoid robot features a rounded, dome-shaped head with two large, glowing blue mesh-like eyes set into a weathered, white and gray surface. Its torso is compact and slightly tapered, connecting to articulated arms and legs via visible joint mechanisms with metallic and dark accent rings. The arms are outstretched horizontally, ending in five-fingered hands with black tips, while the legs are robust and end in wide, rounded feet with textured pads. The robot's surface is mottled and appears worn, suggesting exposure to outdoor environments. The overall design is friendly and approachable, with a simple, utilitarian aesthetic and clear articulation points for movement.
description: A weathered, white and gray humanoid robot with glowing blue eyes, articulated limbs, and outstretched arms, designed for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's large blue eyes, outstretched arms, and five-fingered hands, with the torso and legs fully visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the dome-shaped head, curved torso, and the layered joints of the arms and legs, with the blue eyes visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head and torso, the arm joints, and the textured backs of the feet, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the head profile, arm and leg joints, and the blue eye mesh partially visible.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the robot is covered in integrated panels with a weathered, painted finish.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of two large, glowing blue mesh eyes set into a rounded head; no visible mouth, nose, or other facial features.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible rotary and hinge joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands have articulated fingers, suggesting a wide range of motion.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two large blue mesh eyes on the head, likely functioning as cameras or visual sensors; no other sensors are visible.
